# Short drive line (50,100) -> (130,100). Splice vertices land at every
# auto-graph crossing strictly inside the control segment — the line
# never extends past either endpoint to reach a further edge.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(300,0)
(300,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(300,200), area 60000

drive-line
(50,100)
(130,100)
----
drive-line (50,100) -> (130,100)

generate
----
total_stalls: 90
faces: 8 (boundary: 1, interior: 7)
graph: 16 vertices, 21 edges (perimeter: 12, interior: 9)
regions: 1
